title: First-Line Supervisors of Police and Detectives
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of members of police force.

tasks.text: Supervise and coordinate the investigation of criminal cases, offering guidance and expertise to investigators, and ensuring that procedures are conducted in accordance with laws and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare work schedules and assign duties to subordinates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct collection, preparation, and handling of evidence and personal property of prisoners.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate and resolve personnel problems within organization and charges of misconduct against staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain police operations to subordinates to assist them in performing their job duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain logs, prepare reports, and direct the preparation, handling, and maintenance of departmental records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform personnel of changes in regulations and policies, implications of new or amended laws, and new techniques of police work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train staff in proper police work procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discipline staff for violation of department rules and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and evaluate the job performance of subordinates, and authorize promotions and transfers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review contents of written orders to ensure adherence to legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct raids and order detention of witnesses and suspects for questioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cooperate with court personnel and officials from other law enforcement agencies and testify in court, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with civic, educational, and community groups to develop community programs and events, and to discuss law enforcement subjects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect facilities, supplies, vehicles, and equipment to ensure conformance to standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct release or transfer of prisoners.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Requisition and issue equipment and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, and revise departmental policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare news releases and respond to police correspondence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare budgets and manage expenditures of department funds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
